the svg file is a simple shape with two filled areas and a black outline. the first path creates a white square with a light gray fill, and the second path adds a darker color to the same square. the black path outlines the square, creating a contrast with the filled areas. the final shape is a square with a dark border and two colored sections. 

the square is positioned at the center of the svg canvas, with its top edge aligned to the top of the canvas. the square has a width and height of 32 units, and its fill color is set to #636363, which is a dark gray. the square is surrounded by a lighter gray fill, creating a subtle gradient effect. the square is also outlined with a black border, adding a visible edge to the shape.
